dual_intent_strategy.primary_intent: commercial — buyer evaluating what they get with a Curious Tails puppy vs buying gear separately
dual_intent_strategy.secondary_intent: informational — new owner researching what a puppy starter kit should contain
dual_intent_strategy.resolution: Answer 'what should a starter kit contain' with the definitive 8-category, 30+ item breakdown (informational win), then anchor that every item is already included with every Curious Tails puppy and set up at home (transactional).

meta_title: Puppy Starter Kit Singapore: 30+ Items Included | Curious Tails
meta_description: What's included in a puppy starter kit? Ours has 30+ items worth $500+ across 8 categories: playpen, carrier, grooming, food, toilet training and more, free with every puppy and set up at home.
h1: Inside Our Puppy Starter Kit: 30+ Items, $500+ Value

entity_definitions.definition: Curious Tails is an AVS licensed pet shop in Balestier, Singapore (licence AS24J00046) that includes a 30+ item starter kit worth $500+ with every puppy, delivered and set up at the buyer's home free.

A puppy starter kit is the set of equipment a new owner needs from day one: housing (playpen, bed), transport (carrier), feeding (bowls, puppy food), toilet training (pads, cleaner), grooming tools, oral care, outdoor gear (leash, harness) and toys. Retail kits in Singapore run $20 to $200 and cover only part of the list; a complete set bought separately costs $500 or more.

serp_analysis.search_intent_confirmation: Mixed: shoppers comparing kit bundles and new owners asking what a kit should contain; Shopping carousel present, so commercial intent is confirmed.

faq.question: Is the starter kit really free?
faq.answer_direction: It is included in every puppy's price ($2,888 to $4,488); no add-on, no minimum spend, no membership. Bought separately the same items are a $500+ shopping trip.

faq.question: What exactly is in the kit?
faq.answer_direction: 30+ items across 8 categories: playpen and bed, carrier, feeding bowls and food, toilet training supplies, grooming tools, oral care, outdoor gear, and toys.

faq.question: Will the playpen fit a small HDB flat?
faq.answer_direction: Yes; we set it up ourselves during delivery and place it to suit your layout, away from direct sun and aircon draft.

faq.question: What food comes in the kit?
faq.answer_direction: The same small-breed puppy food your puppy is already eating, so there is no sudden diet change; transitions to another brand should be gradual over a week.

faq.question: When will my puppy outgrow the starter items?
faq.answer_direction: Most items serve the first 6 to 12 months; the playpen, bowls, and grooming tools last well beyond. We advise on sizing up during the walkthrough and on WhatsApp after.

faq.question: Can the kit be delivered before the puppy?
faq.answer_direction: The kit arrives with your puppy on delivery day and is set up before your puppy explores; that is deliberate, so the space smells and reads as home from minute one.
